_description: Default critique evaluation framework. Overridable via user profile or session.

evaluation_dimensions.name: expected_value_vs_view
evaluation_dimensions.description: EV of the PM's structure versus the recommended alternatives, given the stated view probabilities

evaluation_dimensions.name: scenario_underperformance
evaluation_dimensions.description: Specific scenarios where the PM's structure underperforms — not generic, but in the scenarios that matter given this view

evaluation_dimensions.name: execution_considerations
evaluation_dimensions.description: Practical considerations the payout diagram does not show: liquidity at the chosen strikes, bid/offer cost, roll considerations

evaluation_dimensions.name: hedge_effectiveness
evaluation_dimensions.description: Whether the structure hedges what the PM thinks it hedges — delta, gamma, and path dependency

evaluation_dimensions.name: gamma_management
evaluation_dimensions.description: For options structures: what the gamma profile implies for active management requirements
